title: SiTime Q1 2024 Earnings - Beat Estimates as Recovery Continues
text: Revenue for the quarter was $33 million, and non-GAAP gross margins were 57.9%. SiTime reported earnings per share of -8 cents, which was above the analyst estimate for EPS of -15 cents. The company continued to see a downward trend in customer inventories, which resulted in a pickup in order activity. For Q2 2024, the company expected revenue of $40 million to $42 million, an increase of 21% to 27% sequentially. Gross margins were expected to be roughly flat compared with Q1, with non-GAAP earnings per share expected to be in the range of $0.01 to $0.05 per share. This marked a turning point as the company emerged from the inventory correction phase.
